name: mots
description: 6-phase AI pipeline for adding features to existing applications. Framework-agnostic. Consensus + Architecture + Development + Testing + Verification + Delivery.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.title: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key — only required when CONSENSUS_CLAUDE_MODE=api. In the default session mode (inside Claude Code), Claude's consensus roles run via Task subagents and this key is not needed.

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API Key
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for consensus phase (GPT-4o model). Optional — consensus is skipped if missing.

GEMINI_API_KEY.title: Google Gemini API Key
GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google API key for consensus phase (Gemini model). Optional — consensus is skipped if missing.
